description: Returns a road segment containing given position, [[objNull]] otherwise. Same as [[isOnRoad]] only returns the actual road object instead of boolean.
examples:
For detecting bridges, for example:
<sqf>getModelInfo (roadAt ASLToAGL getPosASL player); // ["bridgesea_01_f.p3d", "a3\structures_f_exp\infrastructure\bridges\bridgesea_01_f.p3d", true]</sqf>
name: roadAt

Item.desc: array, in which case Z will be automatically deduced as the height of the road surface
Item.name: position
